channel.title: Privacy on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Privacy on jamesm.blog

item.title: Meta Is Tracking Its Own Employees to Train AI Agents
item.description: Meta's Model Capability Initiative is installing monitoring software on US employee laptops to capture keystrokes, clicks, and screenshots - all to train AI agents. There is no opt-out.

item.title: Local AI vs Cloud AI: The Tradeoff Landscape in 2026
item.description: In 2026, the choice between running AI locally or in the cloud is no longer a binary one. It is a strategic architectural decision based on privacy, latency, and 'reasoning density'.
